description: To improve efficiency, a warehouse manager wants to reorganize the layout, moving high-velocity items closer to the shipping docks.

nodes.task_description: Analyze sales data to identify the fastest-moving products (ABC analysis).

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a report identifying the 'A' items (highest velocity).

nodes.task_description: Generate a new warehouse layout plan that moves the 'A' items to the most accessible locations.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a new slotting plan for the warehouse.

nodes.task_description: Create work orders for the warehouse staff to move the inventory to the new locations.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates the tasks for the physical reorganization.
